final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: surrealist-illustration
Asset type: editorial illustration, dreamscape scene, wide cinematic composition
Primary request: surrealist dream scene — a colossal moon rising from the ocean surface, whales soaring through the sky, melting clocks draped over objects, and a staircase ascending into the clouds
Scene/backdrop: vast open ocean at twilight, sky blending between deep indigo and amber, towering cumulus clouds dissolving into abstraction
Subject: (1) oversized luminous moon emerging from calm reflective sea; (2) multiple humpback whales levitating and gliding through the sky; (3) soft melting clocks draped over ledges and floating debris; (4) an endless stone staircase spiraling upward into cloud layers
Style/medium: surrealist oil painting, inspired by Salvador Dalí and René Magritte, dreamlike and philosophical
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view, low horizon line, dramatic vertical scale contrast between subjects
Lighting/mood: ethereal twilight glow, soft rim light on the moon, cool blue-violet ambient light, mysterious and contemplative
Color palette: deep indigo ocean + warm amber moonlight + pale silver whale skin + muted gold clock faces + soft lavender clouds
Materials/textures: smooth oil-paint brushwork, glossy water surface reflections, soft cloud wisps, weathered stone staircase texture
Constraints: maintain surrealist visual logic — all impossible elements coexist naturally within the dreamscape; strong philosophical and visual impact
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, cartoonish style, cluttered composition, neon colors
